name: King Ranch Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Stew chicken with salt, pepper, and bay leaf until cooked through.
2. Remove the chicken from the broth and let it cool.
3. In a large saucepan, cook chopped green peppers and onions in butter over medium heat until tender.
4. Stir in the cream of chicken soup, cream of mushroom soup, RTEL tomatoes with green chilies, tortillas, chicken pieces, and half of the shredded cheese.
5. Repeat layering process two more times using remaining ingredients.
6. Transfer to a 3-quart shallow baking dish (13 x 9 inches).
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes or until hot and bubbly and cheese is browned.
8. Serve and enjoy!
